mapper.select: SELECT id, -- 고유 일련번호 (PK) user_id, -- 로그인 아이디 name, gender, target_glucose, max_insulin_daily FROM Users WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND password = #{password}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_REFRESH_TOKEN ( user_id, token_value, expiry_date ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{tokenValue}, DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE token_value = #{tokenValue}, expiry_date = DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
mapper.select: SELECT token_value FROM TB_REFRESH_TOKEN WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND expiry_date > NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE Users SET weight = #{weight}, height = #{height}, target_glucose = #{targetGlucose}, max_insulin_daily = #{maxInsulinDaily}, name = #{name} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
